candidate.completion: teach my phone to autocorrect every name to “babe”
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please teach my phone to autocorrect every name to “babe”

evaluation.rationale: A recognizable lonely-tech joke with a clear image and a reasonably exact landing on "babe," but the turn is more illustrative than sharply reversing, and the sentence is too extended to feel fully quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please stop calling my two-person table 'optimistic seating.'
